recommendations.title: Electroma
recommendations.overview: Two robots embark on a quest to become human.

recommendations.title: Bad Milo!
recommendations.overview: A horror comedy centered on a guy who learns that his unusual stomach problems are being caused by a demon living in his intestines.

recommendations.title: Manta, Manta

recommendations.title: Love Hard
recommendations.overview: An LA girl, unlucky in love, falls for an East Coast guy on a dating app and decides to surprise him for Christmas, only to discover that she's been catfished. But the object of her affection actually lives in the same town, and the guy who duped her

recommendations.title: Waiting for Forever
recommendations.overview: A Hollywood-set romantic tale of a guy who is content to live his life without a job yet with the love of his life, a young actress.

recommendations.title: Sex and Death 101
recommendations.overview: A guy's life is turned around by an email, which includes the names of everyone he's had sex with and ever will have sex with. His situation gets worse when he encounters a femme fatale who targets men guilty of sex crime.

recommendations.title: Guy

recommendations.title: Naomi and Ely's No Kiss List
recommendations.overview: The bonds between Naomi and Ely are tested when they fall for the same guy.

recommendations.title: Deep Cover

recommendations.title: Mr. Right
recommendations.overview: A girl falls for the "perfect" guy, who happens to have a very fatal flaw: he's a hitman on the run from the crime cartels who employ him.
